SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-08-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-08-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF AVNI FATEHPURIA AND DAVID ZUCKERMAN ARE PRESENT BY ZOOM. DEFENDANT IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FATEHPURIA, AVNI ZUCKERMAN, DAVID IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT REAL EQUITY GROUP ONE LLC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
